question: Explain the key concepts of Collins Spag Punctuation
answer:
Punctuation
You must be able to:
•
Clearly demarcate sentences
•
Accurately use a range of punctuation.
8 GCSE English Revision Guide
:sllikS
lacinhceT
yeK
gnitirW
Ending Sentences
• Full stops separate sentences. A common mistake students make is to
use commas instead of full stops.
